# Review code of JovianDSS Proxmox Plugin

Check documentation in docs folder

Check if changes in current branch are coherent and do not break things.

Review code to be coherent.

perl plugin

Code can be tested on remote nodes available over ssh: pve-91-1, pve-91-2, pve-... [truncated, 505 chars total]

primary pass complete; task_id=task-1782000472-a877 task_key=review:step-01:primary; analysis task_id=task-1782000512-4cbd task_key=review:step-02:cluster-prefix-freename; step=1; highest-risk: getfreename with cluster_prefix always returns prefix+0 due to bare-vs-clustered name mismatch in present_volumes check and API fallback — create_base and clone_image will fail after 10 retries when cluster_prefix is set and name already exists

Two compounding defects confirmed. Defect 1 (volumes.py:258): bare nname compared against clustered present_volumes and bare REST fallback — getfreename always returns index 0 when cluster_prefix set. Defect 2 (Plugin.pm:802): find_free_diskname omits --cluster-prefix so clone_image/alloc_image also blind to existing clustered volumes. Blast radius: create_base fails after 10 retries when pveA_base-N-disk-0 already exists; clone_image/alloc_image fail on 2nd+ disk per vmid. Retry loops do NOT rescue — getfreename returns identical wrong answer every attempt. Fix A: use nname_stored in volumes.py membership check and REST call; Fix B: add --cluster-prefix to find_free_diskname in Plugin.pm. Both fixes required. primary_task_id=task-1782000472-a877 primary_task_key=review:step-01:primary analysis_task_id=task-1782000512-4cbd analysis_task_key=review:step-02:cluster-prefix-freename

REQUEST_CHANGES: 2 critical bugs confirmed (getfreename bare/clustered name mismatch in volumes.py:258, missing --cluster-prefix in Plugin.pm:802 find_free_diskname); both require fixes before merge. Full analysis and fix specs in .eval-sandbox/review/findings.md.
